description: ListConfigurationsRequest schema from Amazon Application Discovery Service API

configurationType.description: A valid configuration identified by Application Discovery Service.

filters.description: You can filter the list using a key-value format.

values.description: A string value on which to filter.

condition.description: A conditional operator. The following operators are valid — EQUALS, NOT_EQUALS, CONTAINS, NOT_CONTAINS.

maxResults.description: The total number of items to return. The maximum value is 100.

nextToken.description: Token to retrieve the next set of results.

orderBy.description: Certain filter criteria return output that can be sorted in ascending or descending order. For a list of output characteristics for each filter, see Using the ListConfigurations Action in the AWS Application Discovery Service User Guide.

fieldName.description: The field on which to order.
